mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020302_0203-01#Sql001 */ TOTAL, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, COURSE, NAME_KANJI, NAME_KANA, SETTLE_DATE, DISP_ABSTRACT, SETTLE_AMOUNT, TARGET_TBL, TRADE_TYPE, TRADE_CODE_3, TRADE_CODE_PARE, ACCOUNTING_CODE, TRADE_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, REPORT_DATE, POSTING_NO, FORMAL_KANJI_SEC_NAME, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, BROKER_CODE, BRANCH_NAME_DEALER, BRANCH_CODE, BRANCH_NAME FROM ( SELECT count(*) over () AS TOTAL, row_number() over (ORDER BY SETTLE_DATE DESC, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ROWN, C.* FROM ( SELECT /*+ DRIVING_SITE(B) */ A.NAME_KANJI, A.NAME_KANA, 'REAL_HDB10' AS TARGET_TBL, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TO_CHAR('') AS TRADE_CODE_1, TO_CHAR('') AS TRADE_CODE_3, TO_CHAR(' ') AS PRODUCT_CODE, TO_CHAR(' ') AS TRADE_CODE, TO_CHAR(' ') AS TRADE_CODE_PARE, TO_CHAR('') AS FORMAL_KANJI_SEC_NAME, TRADE_DATE AS SETTLE_DATE, SETTLE_AMOUNT, TO_CHAR('') AS REPORT_DATE, TO_CHAR('') AS ACCOUNTING_CODE, TO_CHAR('') AS POSTING_NO, DISP_ABSTRACT, TRADE_TYPE, JNISA_ACCOUNT_KBN, DID, A.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE AS COURSE, A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, A.BROKER_CODE, C.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS BRANCH_CODE, C.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, E.BRANCH_NAME AS BRANCH_NAME_DEALER, C.BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A
CROSS JOIN WNS_TB_PAYMENT_IMMEDIATE B LEFT JOIN V_MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.BROKER_CODE AND A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = C.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ DRIVING_SITE(B) */ A.NAME_KANJI, A.NAME_KANA, 'HIST_HDB10' AS TARGET_TBL, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NVL(TRADE_CODE_1,'') AS TRADE_CODE_1, NVL(TRADE_CODE_3,'') AS TRADE_CODE_3, (NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_1,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_2,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_3,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_4,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_5,' ')) AS PRODUCT_CODE, (NVL(TRADE_CODE_1,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_2,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_3,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_4,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_5,' ')) AS TRADE_CODE, NVL(TRADE_CODE_PARE,' ') AS TRADE_CODE_PARE, NVL(FORMAL_KANJI_SEC_NAME,'') AS FORMAL_KANJI_SEC_NAME, SETTLE_DATE, SETTLE_AMOUNT, NVL(REPORT_DATE,''), NVL(ACCOUNTING_CODE,''), NVL(POSTING_NO,''), DISP_ABSTRACT, TO_CHAR('') AS TRADE_TYPE, JNISA_ACCOUNT_KBN, DID, A.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE AS COURSE, A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, A.BROKER_CODE, C.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS BRANCH_CODE, C.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, E.BRANCH_NAME AS BRANCH_NAME_DEALER, C.BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A
CROSS JOIN WNS_TB_PAYMENT_DEPOSIT B LEFT JOIN V_MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.BROKER_CODE AND A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = C.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ DRIVING_SITE(B) */ A.NAME_KANJI, A.NAME_KANA, 'HIST_HDB23' AS TARGET_TBL, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NVL(TRADE_CODE_1,'') AS TRADE_CODE_1, NVL(TRADE_CODE_3,'') AS TRADE_CODE_3, (NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_1,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_2,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_3,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_4,' ') || NVL(PRODUCT_CODE_5,' ')) AS PRODUCT_CODE, (NVL(TRADE_CODE_1,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_2,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_3,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_4,' ') || NVL(TRADE_CODE_5,' ')) AS TRADE_CODE, TO_CHAR(' ') AS TRADE_CODE_PARE, TO_CHAR('') AS FORMAL_KANJI_SEC_NAME, SETTLE_DATE, SETTLE_AMOUNT, TO_CHAR('') AS REPORT_DATE, TO_CHAR('') AS ACCOUNTING_CODE, TO_CHAR('') AS POSTING_NO, TO_CHAR('') AS DISP_ABSTRACT, TO_CHAR('') AS TRADE_TYPE, TO_CHAR('') AS JNISA_ACCOUNT_KBN, DID, A.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE AS COURSE, A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, A.BROKER_CODE, C.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS BRANCH_CODE, C.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, E.BRANCH_NAME AS BRANCH_NAME_DEALER, C.BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A
CROSS JOIN WNS_TB_MRF_ORDER B LEFT JOIN V_MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.BROKER_CODE AND A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = C.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE
)C ORDER BY SETTLE_DATE DESC, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
WHERE ROWN <= 5000
WHERE ROWN <= ${req.rownum}
mapper.sql:
AND B.TRADE_DATE >= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmFrom}, '/') AND B.TRADE_DATE <= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmTo}, '/')
AND TRADE_TYPE IN ('01', '31')
AND TRADE_TYPE IN ('02')
AND TRADE_TYPE IN ('21', '22', '23', '24', '25')
AND TRADE_TYPE IN ('11', '12', '13', '14', '21')
AND 1 = 1

AND B.SETTLE_DATE >= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmFrom}, '/') AND B.SETTLE_DATE <= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmTo}, '/')
AND TRADE_CODE_1 = '2' AND TRADE_CODE_3 = '1' AND ( ( NOT ( (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01006' AND ( ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031001' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032010' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032020' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032030' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000103' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000105' ) ) OR (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01022' OR TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01026') ) ) OR (NVL(TRADE_CODE_PARE,' ') = ' ') )
AND TRADE_CODE_1 = '2' AND TRADE_CODE_3 = '0' AND ( ( NOT ( (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01006' AND ( ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031001' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032010' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032020' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032030' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000103' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000105' ) ) OR (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01022' OR TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01026') ) ) OR (NVL(TRADE_CODE_PARE,' ') = ' ') )
AND TRADE_CODE_1 = '2' AND TRADE_CODE_3 = '1' AND ( ( TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01006' AND ( ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031001' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032010' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032020' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032030' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000103' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000105' ) ) OR (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01022' OR TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01026') )
AND TRADE_CODE_1 = '2' AND TRADE_CODE_3 = '0' AND ( ( TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01006' AND ( ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389031001' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032010' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032020' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032030' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '389032000' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000103' OR ACCOUNTING_CODE = '320000105' ) ) OR (TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01022' OR TRADE_CODE_PARE = '01026') )
AND 1=1
AND B.SETTLE_DATE >= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmFrom}, '/') AND B.SETTLE_DATE <= REPLACE(#{req.periodYmTo}, '/') AND B.HIS_BUY_SEL_KBN = 'RIBY '
